title: Mammal mitogenomics from invertebrate-derived DNA (iDNA)
author: Danabalan Renita
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Mitogenomic capture of Non-human Primates from invertebrate derived DNA using hybridisation capture.  

 Files are in fastq format and sequenced with illumina Mi-Seq using the Mi-Seq Reagent Kit v3 (2 x 250bp; illumina) .
steps_raw:
Mitogenomic capture of Non-human Primates from invertebrate derived DNA using hybridisation capture.  

 Files are in fastq format and sequenced with illumina Mi-Seq using the Mi-Seq Reagent Kit v3 (2 x 250bp; illumina) .
keywords: iDNA, mitogenome, Hybridisation capture, non-human primates, fly, leech
